bird.name: Paria whitestart
bird.summary: The Paria whitestart (Myioborus pariae), also known as the Paria redstart, yellow-faced whitestart or yellow-faced redstart, is a passerine…

relations.subject: Paria whitestart
relations.evidence: It is threatened by on-going habitat loss within its tiny range, which is near-entirely contained within the Península de Paria National Park
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Paria whitestart
relations.evidence: However, the southern slope of Cerro Humo, which may support a substantial amount of the existing Paria whitestart population, is not within the boundaries of the park and is accessible by road, and suffers from increased habitat disturbance and forest clearance as a result
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
